touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Owen Taylor at PivotCapital expressing interest in conversation intelligence tools for their sales team. Owen mentioned they're currently evaluating options including Gong and are looking for something that fits their growing team.

Follow-up email confirming qualification call. Owen responded quickly asking about pricing tiers and implementation timeline. Mentioned he recently joined as Head of Sales and wants to get the team set up with proper tooling.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 1-2 weeks for initial setup and training for teams under 30 reps

touches.ai_summary: Discovery follow-up email recapping their use case around rep productivity and coaching. Owen confirmed they need coverage for about 10 reps and emphasized automation features. He asked about integrations with their CRM.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce and our existing email systems?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native Salesforce integration and support for Gmail/Outlook

next_steps: Schedule demo for unlimited automation tier
Prepare demo focused on coaching workflows

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email. Owen responded positively about the automation features but asked for more details on how pricing compares to Gong. Mentioned he needs to move quickly as they're scaling the team.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Gong for similar features?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier offers more inclusive features at a competitive price point - can walk through detailed comparison on next call

touches.ai_summary: 15-minute proposal call walking through pricing options for 10 seats. Owen expressed interest but mentioned budget constraints and asked about discount options since they're a startup. Discussed value of unlimited automation tier versus basic package.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing given we're an early-stage company?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore options - let me see what we can do for a multi-year commitment

questions_asked.question: Have you had a chance to loop in your CFO or CEO on the investment?
questions_asked.answer: Not yet - I have budget authority for sales tools up to a certain threshold

objections: Price point higher than initial budget allocation

touches.ai_summary: 9-minute pricing negotiation call. Owen pushed for additional discount to get closer to Gong's quoted price. Agreed to $7,200 ACV (approximately 30% off list) for 10 seats on annual contract. Owen confirmed he can sign within the week without additional approvals needed.

questions_asked.question: Can you match the Gong pricing they quoted us?
questions_asked.answer: We can't match exactly but offered $7,200 ACV which includes more automation features than their comparable tier
